meta.title: Iberian Culture | Jabugo Bodega
meta.description: Educational content on Iberian breed, montanera, curing, and hand slicing based on Jabugo Bodega research.

sections.title: Iberian breed and montanera
paragraphs: 100% Iberian acorn-fed ham comes from animals with full Iberian lineage.
During montanera, free-range acorn feeding provides aromatic notes and high-quality fat.

quote.text: Iberian culture explains why this product carries this level of value.
quote.author: Nicolás

sections.title: Curing and hand slicing
paragraphs: In premium pieces, curing in natural bodegas ranges between 36 and 48 months.
Hand slicing into thin cuts supports aromatic expression and texture on the palate.

quote.text: Hand slicing is an essential part of the gastronomic experience.
quote.author: Nicolás

image.alt: Pieces in natural bodega curing process
